headline: Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Shoots Up As CEO Terry Green Reveals Stock Acquisition: What You Should Know
summary: Trade Desk shares surged 9% after-hours as CEO Jeffrey Green bought more than 6 million shares near the stock's 52-week low.
